sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kinross Gold Corporation (NYSE:KGC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Kinross Gold reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, reaffirming its stable multiyear production profile of 2 million ounces through 2028. The company achieved record free cash flow, strengthened its balance sheet with $1 billion net cash, and is increasing capital returns to shareholders, targeting 40% of free cash flow in 2026 primarily through share repurchases. Kinross is also advancing several high-quality projects, including three U.S. projects expected to come online in 2028, and is making progress on the Great Bear and Lobo Marte development projects.

feed.title: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc: Zimbabwe Mining Forum: Perception Vs Reality Highlights Video
feed.summary: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc hosted the Zimbabwe Mining Forum on February 10, 2026, in Cape Town, bringing together around 150 mining professionals, investors, and government officials. The event featured addresses from senior Zimbabwean officials, including the Permanent Secretaries for the Ministry of Mines and Mining Development and the Ministry of Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion, emphasizing that "the country is open for business." This forum aimed to bridge the gap between perception and reality regarding investment opportunities in Zimbabwe's mining sector.

feed.title: GATX Q4 Deep Dive: Growth Driven by Wells Fargo Rail Acquisition and Engine Leasing Strength
feed.summary: GATX reported Q4 CY2025 results that exceeded revenue and profit expectations, driven by strong performance in its core leasing business and the strategic Wells Fargo Rail acquisition. The company highlighted robust demand in the secondary railcar market and significant growth in engine leasing. Looking ahead, GATX's guidance emphasizes the full integration of the acquired rail portfolio, ongoing optimization, and continued investment to leverage favorable industry trends.

feed.title: PPL shares fall nearly 4% after In-Line Q4 EPS, $23B Capital Plan announcement

feed.title: Emerson Electric Rose 15% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Emerson Electric Co. stock has risen 15% in the last six months, trading near $151 per share, driven by strong order trends and improved visibility for 2026 earnings, particularly in automation and software. The company's valuation model suggests a target price of $179, implying an 18.5% upside, largely supported by sustained order growth, expanding Annual Contract Value (ACV), and strength in LNG and power modernization despite weaknesses in China and Europe. The article concludes that Emerson Electric appears modestly undervalued, with its performance in 2026 expected to be driven by automation demand, recurring software revenue, and disciplined execution.

feed.title: White House Pushes Trump's Ban On Investors With 100+ Single-Family Homes: Report
feed.summary: The White House is advancing President Donald Trump's proposed ban on investors owning over 100 single-family homes, sending a memo to House and Senate committee leaders. This plan aims to restrict such investors from acquiring more properties, though it includes exemptions for those who build or significantly renovate homes specifically for renting. The proposal has faced skepticism from some experts and Democrats due to perceived limitations and an absence of requirements for investors to divest existing properties.

feed.title: Duke Energy, Charlotte begin LED overhaul of 1,096 uptown lights to boost safety
feed.summary: Duke Energy and the city of Charlotte are undertaking a project to convert over 1,000 uptown lights to LED technology by fall. This upgrade, which aims to enhance safety, will also include smart monitoring capabilities to automatically detect outages. The initiative involves 1,096 lights and is being managed by Duke Energy.

feed.title: PG&E Corporation Declares First Quarter Dividend for 2026, Payable on April 15, 2026

feed.title: Boeing Brings Defense HQ Back to St. Louis in Major Strategic Shift
feed.summary: Boeing has announced the return of its Defense, Space & Security (BDS) business headquarters to St. Louis, Missouri, a strategic shift aimed at strengthening engagement with its workforce. This move, separating BDS from Boeing's corporate HQ in Arlington, VA, highlights the company's commitment to disciplined performance and its substantial presence in the St. Louis area, a significant aerospace and defense hub. The region produces several key defense aircraft and components, and local officials have praised the relocation for its positive impact on the state's manufacturing sector.
